headline: ICE Q1 Deep Dive: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Innovation Drive Q1 2026 Results
summary: Global market infrastructure company Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 20.4% year on year to $2.98 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
